steps.title: Calculate perimeter components
steps.content:
The triangle is isosceles with two congruent sides of 19 feet each. The perimeter is the sum of all sides: $$66 = 19 + 19 + x$$ where $x$ is the third side.

Sum of the two equal sides: $19 + 19 = 38$. Subtract this from the total perimeter: $$66 - 38 = 28$$.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
